description: At Stone & Clark, we observe the lives of our customers in order to provide them with viable solutions for a few everyday living problems. We are a lifestyle brand based in Canada, it is our aim to provide quality products to the customers that fit the needs of the entire family. We pride ourselves on providing our customers with cost effective, user-friendly items that are easy solutions to their everyday needs.
